overall.description: A nighttime elevated train journey through a futuristic cyberpunk city district, featuring neon-lit buildings, large digital billboards, and modern urban infrastructure. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity cinematic rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track between commercial buildings

events.description: train departs from station area into open elevated track section
train passes under concrete overpass structure, temporarily obscuring sky view

agents.ego_description: traveling as a passenger on an elevated monorail, observing neon-lit buildings passing by the window

entered.detail: illuminated red signage with 'PACIFICA' text visible through the train window
modern building with horizontal strips of illuminated windows
large concrete highway or walkway passing over the train tracks
metal and glass frame of the train window visible in foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside an elevated train cabin, showing a 'PACIFICA' neon sign and modern glass buildings with illuminated windows. The train moves steadily along elevated tracks, passing under concrete overpasses in a semi-enclosed urban environment with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track crossing over large urban intersection with digital advertising displays

events.description: emerging from enclosed track section into open plaza area with large digital billboards visible
increased illumination from surrounding digital billboards and street lights below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated track, now passing over a wide intersection dominated by large digital advertisements and neon signage

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying a woman's face advertisement
tall digital advertisement with red and white graphics
wide urban intersection with crosswalk markings visible below the tracks
illuminated street lamps lining the intersection below

segments.scene_description: The train emerges into a wide-open urban plaza, revealing large digital billboards displaying advertisements against the night sky. The track curves slightly right as it passes over a major intersection, with the glow of neon signs and street lights illuminating the scene from below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track passing under large red and white station canopy structure

events.description: entering covered section beneath large red and white architectural station structure
passing under the station canopy overhang, reducing sky visibility and changing light conditions

agents.ego_description: traveling under a large station structure, with the train passing through a more enclosed architectural space with concrete supports

entered.detail: distinctive architectural structure with red and white panels forming a canopy over the tracks
thick concrete columns supporting the elevated station structure
scattered lights from buildings visible in the distance beyond the station

segments.scene_description: The train passes beneath a distinctive red and white station canopy, creating a semi-covered environment. Concrete support pillars line the track as the train continues through this architectural section, with distant city lights visible beyond the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track approaching distant skyscraper district with minimal nearby lighting

events.description: exiting the covered station area into open track with view of distant illuminated skyline
reduced local lighting as the train moves away from the commercial district into a darker section of track

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated track toward distant illuminated skyscrapers, leaving the dense neon district behind

entered.detail: tall buildings with illuminated windows visible on the horizon against the night sky
metal safety railing along the elevated track in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The train exits the covered station area and continues through a darker section of the elevated line, with distant illuminated skyscrapers visible on the horizon. The immediate surroundings become darker as the train moves away from the dense commercial neon district toward the distant city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a dense, neon-lit urban corridor into a darker, expansive stretch of the city skyline. It begins inside an elevated train cabin passing modern glass buildings and a glowing PACIFICA sign, moving steadily under concrete overpasses. As the train emerges from these enclosures, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza filled with massive digital billboards and the vibrant glow of a major intersection below. The camera then glides beneath a red and white station canopy, passing a series of concrete support pillars that momentarily frame the distant city lights. Finally, the train exits the covered structure and moves away from the commercial neon district, with the immediate surroundings darkening as the horizon reveals illuminated skyscrapers in the distance.
